use_cases: Landing page headers for SaaS products and marketing sites
Product showcase sections with animated call-to-action buttons
Hero sections with split/diced visual layout patterns
Marketing campaigns requiring engaging hover animations
Responsive hero components for modern web applications
ai_summary: A diced-style hero section component featuring a split grid layout with animated interactive buttons. The buttons use 3D flip animations with smooth cubic-bezier transitions for text reveals on hover. Built with responsive flexbox layout, making it suitable for both desktop and mobile platforms. Ideal for SaaS landing pages, product showcases, and marketing sites requiring engaging visual effects and clear calls-to-action.
